products.name: Outdoor Lounge Chair Set
products.description: Sculptural outdoor lounge chairs with a low-slung profile engineered for expansive terraces and poolside environments. Available as a matched pair with coordinating accent tables. Built to endure the elements without compromising on form — the intersection of resort hospitality and residential permanence.
products.materials: Weather-resistant powder-coated aluminum frame, premium Sunbrella fabric cushions, UV-stabilized matte finish, stainless steel hardware
products.dimensions: Chair: 32"W × 34"D × 28"H · Seat Height: 14" · Sold as a pair

products.name: Round Coffee Table Natural
products.description: A handcrafted solid wood coffee table with an organic live-edge profile and an oil-finished surface that deepens with age. Anchors a living space with quiet authority — the kind of piece that reads as art before furniture. Equally at home in a minimalist loft or a richly layered residential interior.
products.materials: Solid white oak, natural oil finish, hairpin steel legs, non-marking floor glides

products.name: C-Table Marble & Brass
products.description: A versatile C-profile side table engineered to slide beneath sofas and seating with effortless precision. The Calacatta marble top — with its characteristic veining — brings geological permanence to the everyday ritual of a morning coffee. The polished brass base grounds the piece in warmth.
products.materials: Calacatta marble top, solid polished brass base, satin-brushed hardware, felt floor pads

products.name: Drum Coffee Table Brass Band
products.description: A monolithic drum silhouette wrapped in a precision-fitted equatorial brass band. The table carries the visual mass and gravity of fine sculpture while remaining decidedly functional. A centrepiece that commands a room and rewards close inspection — the brass band catches light differently at every hour of the day.
products.materials: Wrapped drum body with hand-applied lacquer finish, precision brass inlay band, polished tempered glass top

products.name: Console Table Glass & Brass
products.description: An architectural entry console with a razor-thin brass frame and full-width tempered glass shelving. Designed to receive a space — the first object encountered, the first impression made. Scaled for foyer, gallery, and hallway placement. The transparency of the glass reads as near-weightlessness against any wall.
products.materials: Brass-plated steel frame, satin finish, two-tier tempered glass shelves, adjustable floor levellers

_note: HOW TO ADD MORE PRODUCTS (slots 6–14): Copy any product object above, assign a unique 'id' (kebab-case), set 'featured: true' for every 3rd product to maintain the editorial grid rhythm (featured products span 2 columns). Add product images to images/products/. Set 'shopifyVariantId' once the Shopify Buy Button is configured.
_shopify: SHOPIFY INTEGRATION: When ready, install the Shopify Buy Button SDK. Each product card in shop.html and the Add to Cart button in product-detail.html has data-shopify-variant-id attributes. Populate 'shopifyVariantId' in this file and the JavaScript will wire everything automatically. See <!-- SHOPIFY INTEGRATION --> comments in shop.html and product-detail.html.
